entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the host plant evaluated for resistance to pulse beetle

entities.name: PULSE BEETLE
entities.description: Callosobruchus chinensis, a major storage insect pest of chickpea

entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to withstand attack by Callosobruchus chinensis

entities.name: STORED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environment in which chickpea seeds are stored and susceptible to pulse beetle attack

entities.name: FREE CHOICE AND NO-CHOICE TESTS
entities.description: Laboratory tests used to determine the resistance of chickpea genotypes to pulse beetles

entities.name: PI 599066
entities.description: A chickpea genotype that exhibited complete resistance to Callosobruchus chinensis

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The location of ICRISAT from which chickpea genotypes were obtained

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Programs aimed at developing resistant chickpea varieties

entities.name: ORGANIC CULTIVATION
entities.description: Agricultural practice that avoids the use of synthetic pesticides

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control pests
